---
name: Hardware Compatibility
about: Report that your FC board works (or doesn't) with LogFalcon
labels: hardware-compat
---

## FC compatibility report

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| FC board | e.g. Matek F405-WTE |
| Firmware & version | e.g. Betaflight 4.5.0 |
| Blackbox storage | Internal SPI flash |
| LogFalcon version | e.g. v0.4.0 |
| Result | ✅ Works / ❌ Fails / ⚠️ Partial |
